en.extract:
The Papuan sittella (Daphoenositta papuensis) is one of three species of bird in the family Neosittidae.
It is endemic to New Guinea, where it is found in the highlands.

The '''Papuan sittella''' ('''''Daphoenositta papuensis''''') is one of three species of [[bird]] in the family [[Neosittidae]].
It is endemic to [[New Guinea]], where it is found in the highlands.
